chinese_news.title: 理想整车研发负责人刘立国：说理想不重视技术，是大大的误解
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车整车电动研发高级副总裁 刘立国

文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

走过10年造车历程后，新势力阵营已经普遍从“轻盈”走向“厚重”。尤其是理想汽车，这家公司高呼成为“ 具身智能企业”，但也同时在垒高每一块整车技术能力。

尤其是过去4年，理想汽车几乎重构了底盘系统，联合供应商深度共创了底盘三大项：EMB刹车+800V主动悬架+线控转向。

理想在电池上也在进行自制布局，同时，在自身起家的增程技术上，理想也走到了自研自制阶段

chinese_news.title: 硬氪专访 | 拿到行业最大单笔融资后，余轶南说万里长征才走了第一步
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

余轶南似乎是那种总能提前踩中风口的冒险家。

他总在追逐更新、更刺激，早期甚至带着些浪漫想象。博士毕业后，他没有如很多同侪一般，进入学术圈，过上平稳安定的一生，而是冲入互联网浪潮，2015年，他又因为余凯一句“我们一起去做 AI 芯片吧？” ，便追随余凯加入地平线创始团队，成为001号员工。此后几年，地平线逐渐成长为国际上自动驾驶领域最受关注的科技公司之一，并于2024年在港交所上市，成为当年港股最大的IPO。

2024年底，他离开地平线，创立「维他动力」，希望把过去十年在自动驾驶领域积累的能力，迁移到消费级机器人上。

员工人均奖金达610万人民币？SK海力士回应

近日有消息称，SK海力士韩国员工人均奖金将达610万人民币。该消息源于国际投行麦格理证券的预测。该投行认为，若SK海力士2027 年营业利润达到447万亿韩元，按营业利润的10%和去年年末约3.5万名员工总数简单计算，分红总规模将达到约44.7万亿韩元，人均可发放奖金约12.9亿韩元，接近610万人民币。5月9日，SK海力士向第一财经记者回应称，由于今年与明年的年度业绩尚未确定，奖金规模也无法预测。该公司同时表示，已在总部层面建立了一套新制度，即以营业利润的10%作为资金来源，每年发放一次绩效奖金。（第一

chinese_news.title: Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang：中国卖家，正在涌向俄罗斯｜专访
chinese_news.summary:
编者按：上个月月底，36氪在厦门参加了一场Ozon全球招商启动大会，我们发现现场人山人海。火热的出海和国内经济形成鲜明对比，特别是一组数据吸引了我们注意：尽管俄罗斯电商渗透率在2025年才23%，但是Ozon在2017年至2025年间，实现了91%的年均复合增长率。

这些高增长数据背后，似乎隐藏着比较大的商业机会，但机会究竟是什么？中国卖家如何在AI时代抓住？那边电商处于什么阶段？带着这些疑问，36氪和Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang（黄效）进行了一次交流。结论就是：俄语区还有比较长的红利期，中国电商迁移过去有足够的品牌优势、供应链优势，以及运营优势。以下为正文：

过去几年，中国跨境电商最拥挤的地方，是欧美。

以深圳坂田、龙华、华强北为代表的无数跨境卖家，围绕亚马逊、独立站、TikTok Shop和Temu，构建起了一整套成熟的方法论：选品、投流、铺货、品牌化、海外仓、达人营销……。可以说，中国供应链几乎把全球电商卷了个遍。

但202

chinese_news.title: 融资超亿元、割草机器人公司拿下数亿订单，瞄准庭院具身终端｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，智能庭院机器人公司「长曜创新」近日完成数千万元A+融资，领投方为美的系上市公司盈峰环境，老股东XGROUP持续加注。资金将重点投入技术研发迭代、多SKU量产交付及产品矩阵拓展，持续夯实供应链能力，完善全球化渠道布局。此前，公司已于2025年12月完成A轮融资，半年累计融资金额超亿元。

长曜创新成立于2022年，长期专注户外庭院智能硬件赛道，聚焦无边界割草机器人的研发、设计与制造。公司依托自主技术研发与场景化创新能力，围绕草坪养护场景，构建庭院智能全生态系统。

根据Euromonitor等报告显示，2024年，全球割草机器人销售额占割草机总额的9.1%，处于较低水平。分区域看，欧洲市场存量渗透率达20%-30%，普及率较高，但无边界产品替代空间依然广阔；北美家庭草坪面积大、地形复杂，渗透率不足2%位数，是未来扩容的关键市场。

随着庭院机器人市场持续升温，竞争日趋白热化。面对日益同质化的价格战与功能堆叠，市场分化的背后，是现有产品力难以匹配用户的深层需求。长曜

chinese_news.title: AI开始接管年轻人的「精神自留地」
chinese_news.summary:
撰文｜锅包柚

封面来源｜Unsplash（AI辅助扩图）

五一假期已经结束，但打工人的“节后综合症”并未消退。

面对永远99+的工作群消息，和改不完的PPT，打工人蝈蝈在摸鱼时打开灵光APP里的一个小游戏——“老板被我fire了”。

屏幕里跳出老板最爱的PUA话术：“你们要相信我的眼光”“现在的付出都是值得的”。她疯狂点击，伴随着金币掉落的音效，在赛博世界里体验了一把将老板痛扁、原地暴富的爽感。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计设计，

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Brent crude oil close above $110/barrel by 2026-06-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Brent jumped above $105 today on Trump-Iran escalation and Strait of Hormuz disruption; geopolitical premium embedded but trajectory unclear as Modi and Beijing apply countervailing pressure.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Brent oil tops $105), BBC (Trump dismisses Iran proposal), CoinDesk macro commentary

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by 2026-12-31 given energy/inflation shocks?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: China inflation beat estimates despite energy shock via strategic reserves; US consumer sentiment cooling (CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin investors celebrating, consumers gloomy'); Fed chair transition creates decision point.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (China inflation, Modi energy cuts), CoinDesk (Nasdaq vs consumer divide), Fed week ahead signals

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin reach $70,000 or higher by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Institutional reopening post-Iran geopolitical premium (Nasdaq rallying, whale movement $40M BTC); agentic commerce narrative gaining at Consensus Miami; mining pools standardizing (75% hashrate joining open standard).
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Bitcoin whale $40M move, mining pools, Consensus agentic commerce keynotes), trending tokens (SUI +50% staking activity)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Trump-Xi summit occur before 2026-09-01?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC top headline signals world leaders watching; Trump dismissing Iran proposals may unblock bilateral focus; geopolitical decoupling from Middle East conflict provides window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Trump-Xi summit world watching), BBC (Iran stalled, Strait shutdown)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum ETH/BTC ratio exceed 0.08 by 2026-08-31?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will global oil supply disruption (Strait of Hormuz closure) force EU energy emergency protocols by 2026-07-15?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: European Commission official energy announcements or IEA emergency protocols bulletin

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US House Committee on Financial Services official docket or Congress.gov vote record

market_questions_to_create.question: Will XRP price maintain above $1.50 through 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or major CEX closing price on deadline date
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: XRP breakout above $1.45 today is volume-driven but underweights regulatory clarity (CLARITY Act) and Ripple's RippleNet institutional adoption pipeline.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (XRP spikes 2.5%, breakout $1.45); CLARITY Act advancement would provide directional tailwind

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Sui (SUI) token price exceed $3.00 by 2026-07-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap daily close price or Sui Foundation official reference price feed

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) into July 2026 as Middle East energy shock and China producer-price inflation force safe-haven bid despite Fed rate cut trajectory.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Brent crude >$105, Strait of Hormuz disrupted, Modi cutting fuel/gold (emerging market capital flight signal)
CNBC: China inflation beat estimates but only via strategic reserves drawdown (unsustainable hedging)
CoinDesk: Nasdaq strong but US consumer sentiment weak (divergence signals macro instability)
investment_theses.counter_view: If Trump-Xi summit materializes (reducing geopolitical risk) or Fed holds rates steady (reducing carry inversion), DXY retraces as EUR/GBP rebound; oil supply quickly normalized via strategic reserve releases.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (via USDT/USDC yield or DBC inverse), or long USD/JPY and USD/CNY forwards

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin as geopolitical premium stabilizes and institutional reopening on agentic commerce narrative outweighs consumer recession fears.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin whale $40M move + Nasdaq rallying + Consensus Miami institutional keynotes (PayPal, Google agentic commerce)
CoinDesk: Mining pools (75% hashrate) joining open standard signals infrastructure maturity and institutional confidence
Cointelegraph: Bored Ape NFT comeback signals risk appetite rebound
investment_theses.counter_view: US consumer sentiment collapse (CoinDesk) could trigger liquidation cascade if oil shock triggers recession; Iran war widening would push safe-haven into gold/bonds, not crypto.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot via largest ETFs (IBIT, FBTC) or BTC perps (30-60 day duration to capture 2026-07 geopolitical window closure)

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum vs Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio long) through August 2026 as AI agent tokenization and smart contract demand accelerate faster than macro consolidation.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Veteran investor betting Ethereum on AI agent tokenization demand
CoinDesk: Base Azul upgrade, agentic commerce keynotes (PayPal, Google) signal DeFi infrastructure maturation
36Kr: Intelligence in E-commerce (Ozon +91% CAGR to Russia) and AI-driven yield farming (Sui zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push)
investment_theses.counter_view: If macro recession deepens, risk-off environment collapses DeFi yield narratives faster than BTC store-of-value thesis; regulatory crackdown on stablecoins (England central banker 'wrestling' with US) could stall tokenization.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via dydx perpetuals or Bybit; alternatively, long ETH spot and short BTC perps (duration-matched 60-90 days)

investment_theses.thesis: Short European equity indices (vs USD) through June 2026 as Strait of Hormuz energy crisis forces industrial recession and defense spending cannot offset input cost shock.
supporting_signals: CNBC: European markets 'mixed' on Iran stalling; defense stocks slid (allocation shift failed)
CNBC: India signaling severe energy crisis (trade channel spillover to EU exports)
BBC: Iran demand for Strait sovereignty + US naval blockade continuation signals zero-movement in 2026-Q2
investment_theses.counter_view: Defense spending uptick (NATO expansion, Ukraine aid) could offset energy costs for 2-3 months; EU strategic reserves and renewable capacity shelter better than expected (China model).
investment_theses.expression: Short EWG, EWU, or EUSA vs long USD (or short EURUSD/GBPUSD forward contracts, 60-day expiry)

investment_theses.thesis: Long AI-infrastructure tokens (Sui, Ethereum on Layer 2 basis) and short pure-play AI hardware (NVDA) into 2026-Q3 as on-chain agentic commerce reduces dependency on centralized inference.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Agentic commerce will run on crypto rails' (PayPal, Google Consensus keynotes)
36Kr: AI-driven personal finance bots, e-commerce tokenization, intelligent robotics (Sui, Ethereum demand vectors)
Hacker News: 'Local AI needs to be the norm' (score 1051); running local models on M4 (283 comments) signals edge compute shift away from NVIDIA data center
